description_long: This is a medium-sized black frying pan with a flat, circular cooking surface and a gently sloped rim. The interior of the pan features a distinctive white paw print design at its center, adding a playful decorative touch. The handle is long, straight, and ergonomically shaped, made from a material that appears to be heat-resistant plastic or rubber, and is attached securely to the pan with visible fasteners. The rim of the pan includes a small pouring spout on one side, facilitating easy transfer of liquids. The exterior surface is smooth and glossy, suggesting a non-stick or enameled finish. No visible brand logo or markings are present on the pan or handle.
description: A black frying pan with a white paw print design inside, a long ergonomic handle, and a small pouring spout on the rim. The surface is smooth and glossy, with no visible brand markings.
description_view_0: The pan is seen from an angled side, showing the long black handle and the white paw print design inside the pan.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the circular shape, central paw print, and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Another angled side view, showing the opposite side of the handle and the paw print, with the pouring spout visible on the rim.
description_view_3: A direct view of the pan's front, focusing on the pouring spout and the paw print at the center.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, ergonomic handle made of black plastic or rubber, with a smooth surface and no visible grip texture or covering.
attribute_rim_design: Thin, slightly flared rim with a small pouring spout on one side; the edge appears smooth and functional.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible pattern, ridges, or brand markings.
